task:
Uh so I did new payment instead, and it still didn't go through into the database? What the hell is going on here? 
I thought we logged everything into the credit ledger?
create table public.credit_ledger (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  team_id uuid not null,
  event_time timestamp with time zone not null default (now() AT TIME ZONE 'utc'::text),
  kind text not null,
  amount_nanos bigint not null,
  before_balance_nanos bigint not null,
  after_balance_nanos bigint not null,
  ref_type text not null,
  ref_id text not null,
  created_at timestamp with time zone not null default now(),
  status text null,
  source_ref_type text null,
  source_ref_id text null,
  refund_claim_state text null,
  refund_claim_reason text null,
  refund_claimed_at timestamp with time zone null,
  refund_claimed_by_user_id uuid null,
  before_reserved_nanos bigint null,
  after_reserved_nanos bigint null,
  constraint credit_ledger_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint credit_ledger_team_id_fkey foreign KEY (team_id) references teams (id) on delete CASCADE
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create unique INDEX IF not exists credit_ledger_ref_unique on public.credit_ledger using btree (ref_type, ref_id) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create unique INDEX IF not exists credit_ledger_ref_type_ref_id_key on public.credit_ledger using btree (ref_type, ref_id) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists credit_ledger_source_ref_idx on public.credit_ledger using btree (source_ref_type, source_ref_id) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists credit_ledger_refund_claim_state_idx on public.credit_ledger using btree (refund_claim_state) TABLESPACE pg_default
where
  (ref_type = 'Stripe_Payment_Intent'::text);
user_feedback_text:
